modmenu.descriptionTranslation.stuntrack: Turning hotbar slot based skills into customizable keybinds.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.title: SkillKeybind Config
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.enabl: Master on/off switch for the mod.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.showH: Display the stun status pill overlay.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.hudPo: Where to render the status pill on screen.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.showS: Also show a vanilla title/subtitle on state change.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.playR: Play a pling when stun becomes ready.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.playC: Play a bass note when stun goes on cooldown.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.coold: Ticks to wait before switching to cooldown. Prevents flicker.
text.autoconfig.stuntracker.option.skill:
Key to manually toggle skill mode.
Common codes: F=70, G=71, H=72, R=82, T=84, Y=89, Z=90, X=88, C=67, V=86, B=66, N=78, M=77
Numbers: 1=49, 2=50, 3=51, 4=52, 5=53
Default: 70 (F)

Key to cast Skill 1 (server slot 0).
Default: 90 (Z)

Key to cast Skill 2 (server slot 1).
Default: 88 (X)

Key to cast Skill 3 (server slot 2).
Default: 67 (C)

Key to cast Skill 4 (server slot 3).
Default: 86 (V)

Key to cast Skill 5 (server slot 4).
Default: 66 (B)

Key to cast the Ultimate (server slot 5).
Default: 77 (M)
